gloss_en: I told the truth today.
notes: Gipuzkoan 'det'; apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'esan' and the retained three-way sibilant system per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: I have seen seven white cats.
notes: Laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'zazpi', 'zuri' per saltarelli1988; apical/laminal contrast per ladefoged_maddieson1996.

gloss_en: It is cold today in the mountain.
notes: Laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza' and laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The small dogs are in the house.
notes: Post-alveolar affricate ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txakur', 'etxean' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: I drink cold water every day.
notes: Gipuzkoan 'det'; ⟨h⟩ [h] and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza', sandhi 'hotza edaten' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The sea is blue and wide.
notes: Apical affricate ⟨ts⟩ [ts̺] 'itsasoa' vs laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'zabala' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The rooster crows in the morning.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'ollarrak' and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'kantatzen' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: I am sick, crying in pain.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'gaixo' and laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'minez' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: My heart is pounding.
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] 'bihotza' and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The teacher gave me the book.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'andereñoak' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003; sandhi 'liburua eman'.

gloss_en: We found a fine mushroom.
notes: Gipuzkoan 'degu'; palatal plosive ⟨dd⟩ [ɟ] 'onddo' per hualde_lujanbio_zubiri2010.

gloss_en: A drop fell onto my hand.
notes: Palatal plosive ⟨tt⟩ [c] 'ttantta' and apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'eskura' per hualde_lujanbio_zubiri2010.

gloss_en: A little mouse is running about.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xagu', ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txiki' and trill 'korrika' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: You must wash your hands.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'eskuak' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'behar' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: Let us speak together.
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] 'hitz' and apical affricate ⟨ts⟩ [ts̺] 'hitz' → [hits̺] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The salt and pepper on the table.
notes: Laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'gatza', trill 'piperra' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'mahai' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The tree loses its leaves in autumn.
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] 'zuhaitzak', ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'zuhaitzak', 'galtzen' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The girl and the boy walk together.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'neska' and laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'dabiltza' per saltarelli1988.

gloss_en: The castle stands on the hill.
notes: Laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'gaztelua' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003; atonic-vowel coverage per saltarelli1988.

gloss_en: Have the village festivals begun?
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] 'herriko', 'hasi', trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] and apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'festak' per hualde2018_aspiration.
